description: Items from common_magic_items bucket — open-compatible metadata and original summaries.

items.name: Potion of Healing

granted_actions.name: Use Potion of Healing
granted_actions.summary: Consume or apply this item.

items.description_summary: Drink: regain 2d4+2 HP. Takes an action to administer to another creature.

items.name: Potion of Climbing

passive_effects.summary: Climb speed equals walking speed for 1 hour.
Advantage on Athletics (climbing) for 1 hour.

granted_actions.name: Use Potion of Climbing
granted_actions.summary: Consume or apply this item.

items.description_summary: Drink: for 1 hour gain climb speed equal to walking speed and advantage on Strength (Athletics) checks.

items.name: Antitoxin

passive_effects.summary: Advantage on Constitution saves vs poison for 1 hour.

granted_actions.name: Use Antitoxin
granted_actions.summary: Consume or apply this item.

items.description_summary: Drink: advantage on Constitution saves against poison for 1 hour.

items.name: Acid Vial

granted_actions.name: Use Acid Vial
granted_actions.summary: Consume or apply this item.

items.description_summary: Throw at creature/object (5 ft range). Hit: 2d6 acid damage. Near miss: 1 acid damage.

items.name: Alchemist’s Fire

granted_actions.name: Use Alchemist’s Fire
granted_actions.summary: Consume or apply this item.

items.description_summary: Throw at creature/object (20 ft). Hit: 1d4 fire each turn until action to extinguish (DC 10 Dex).

items.name: Basic Poison

granted_actions.name: Use Basic Poison
granted_actions.summary: Consume or apply this item.

items.description_summary: Coat a slashing/piercing weapon or 3 pieces of ammunition (1 minute). First creature hit: DC 10 Con save or 1d4 poison and poisoned 1 min.

items.name: Spell Scroll Cantrip

granted_actions.name: Cast from Scroll
granted_actions.summary: Cast linked spell once, then consume the scroll.

items.description_summary: Contains a cantrip. Any class that can cast cantrips may cast it once, then the scroll is consumed.

items.name: Spell Scroll 1st Level

granted_actions.name: Cast from Scroll
granted_actions.summary: Cast linked spell once, then consume the scroll.

items.description_summary: Contains a 1st-level spell. Cast once (DC 13, +5 attack), scroll consumed.

items.name: Clockwork Amulet

passive_effects.summary: Once per dawn: forgo attack roll to treat it as 10.

granted_actions.name: Clockwork Amulet - Set Roll to 10
granted_actions.summary: Declare before rolling an attack: the roll is treated as 10 (no d20 rolled).

items.description_summary: Once per day, before making an attack roll, you can use the amulet to make the roll result exactly 10.

items.name: Cloak of Billowing

granted_actions.name: Billow Cloak
granted_actions.summary: The cloak billows dramatically until the start of your next turn.

items.description_summary: As a bonus action, cause the cloak to billow dramatically.

items.name: Clothes of Mending

passive_effects.summary: Clothing mends itself over 1 hour when not worn.

items.description_summary: Torn or dirty clothing repairs itself and cleans over 1 hour when not being worn.

items.name: Dark Shard Amulet

passive_effects.summary: Can be used as a warlock spellcasting focus.
1-in-20 chance cantrip without material component fails.

items.description_summary: Warlock arcane focus. When you cast a warlock cantrip without a material component, roll d20 — on 1 the cantrip fails.

items.name: Dread Helm

passive_effects.summary: Wearer's eyes appear to glow red.

items.description_summary: Your eyes appear to glow red while you wear this helm.

items.name: Ersatz Eye

passive_effects.summary: Darkvision 60 ft through the ersatz eye socket.
Cannot be removed while attuned without your consent.

items.description_summary: Replaces a missing eye. While attuned, you have darkvision out to 60 ft through the artificial eye.

items.name: Hat of Vermin

granted_actions.name: Produce Vermin
granted_actions.summary: Produce a bat, frog, or rat. It obeys you and disappears after 1 hour.

items.description_summary: 3 charges. Bonus action: produce a bat, frog, or rat. The creature obeys your commands and disappears after 1 hour or when you use another charge.

items.name: Hat of Wizardry

passive_effects.summary: Can be used as a wizard spellcasting focus.
1-in-10 chance a wizard cantrip without material component fails.

items.description_summary: Arcane focus for wizards. When casting a wizard cantrip without a material component, roll d10 — on 1 the cantrip fails and you may cast a different cantrip you know instead.

items.name: Heward's Handy Spice Pouch

granted_actions.name: Season Food
granted_actions.summary: Season food within reach with any real or imagined spice. Consumes 1 charge.

items.description_summary: 10 charges. Action: season food within reach with any spice, consuming 1 charge. Regain 1d6+4 charges at dawn.

items.name: Horn of Silent Alarm

granted_actions.name: Blow Silent Horn
granted_actions.summary: One creature you choose within 30 ft hears the horn; others do not.

items.description_summary: 4 charges. Action: blow to cause one creature you choose within 30 ft to hear the horn (inaudible to others). Regain 1d4 charges at dawn.

items.name: Instrument of Illusions

passive_effects.summary: Harmless visual illusions within 5 ft while playing the instrument.

items.description_summary: While playing, you can create harmless, soundless illusions within 5 ft of you. The illusions end when you stop playing.

items.name: Instrument of Scribing

granted_actions.name: Scribe While Playing
granted_actions.summary: Write or draw up to 1 page while playing the instrument.

items.description_summary: 3 charges. While holding and playing, write or draw up to 1 page of material at a time. Regain 1d3 charges at dawn.

items.name: Moon-Touched Sword

passive_effects.summary: Sheds bright moonlight in 20 ft radius, dim light for 20 ft beyond while drawn.
Counts as a magical weapon for overcoming resistance.

items.description_summary: Any sword type. Sheds bright moonlight in 20 ft while drawn. Counts as magical.

items.name: Mystery Key

passive_effects.summary: 5% chance to open a mundane lock; one attempt per lock.

items.description_summary: Has a 5% chance to open any mundane lock, once per lock (check never repeated on same lock).

items.name: Orb of Direction

granted_actions.name: Find North
granted_actions.summary: You know which direction is north.

items.description_summary: Action: face north while holding the orb.

items.name: Orb of Time

granted_actions.name: Check Time of Day
granted_actions.summary: Learn whether it is morning, afternoon, evening, or midnight.

items.description_summary: Action: determine whether it is morning, afternoon, evening, or midnight.

items.name: Perfume of Bewitching

passive_effects.summary: Humanoids within scent range have disadvantage on Wis saves vs your effects for 1 hour.

granted_actions.name: Apply Perfume
granted_actions.summary: Apply perfume. For 1 hour, humanoids smelling it have disadvantage on Wis saves vs your abilities.

items.description_summary: Bonus action: apply to yourself. For 1 hour, humanoids that can smell the perfume have disadvantage on Wisdom saving throws against your spells and abilities.

items.name: Pipe of Smoke Monsters

granted_actions.name: Exhale Smoke Shape
granted_actions.summary: Exhale smoke shaped as a Medium or smaller creature. Lasts until your next turn.

items.description_summary: While smoking, exhale smoke in the shape of creatures (Medium or smaller). The shapes last until the start of your next turn.

items.name: Pole of Angling

granted_actions.name: Extend / Collapse Pole
granted_actions.summary: Extend into a 10 ft fishing rod with line, hook, and bait, or collapse to 1 ft.

items.description_summary: Action: extend to a 10 ft fishing rod with line, hook, and bait, or collapse back to a 1 ft pole.

items.name: Pole of Collapsing

granted_actions.name: Collapse / Extend
granted_actions.summary: Pole extends from 1 ft to up to 10 ft (1 ft increments) or collapses.

items.description_summary: Action: collapse (1 ft, 1 lb) or extend (up to 10 ft) as a wooden pole.

items.name: Pot of Awakening

passive_effects.summary: Shrub planted here becomes an Awakened Shrub after 30 days of daily watering.

items.description_summary: Plant a shrub in the pot and water it daily for 30 days. At the end, the shrub becomes an Awakened Shrub.

items.name: Rope of Mending

passive_effects.summary: Severed rope sections rejoin when held together and command word spoken.

items.description_summary: 50 ft rope that repairs itself. Severed sections reattach when held together and the command word is spoken.

items.name: Ruby of the War Mage

passive_effects.summary: Weapon with ruby attached can be used as a spellcasting focus.

items.description_summary: Attach to a weapon. While attuned, you can use the weapon as a spellcasting focus.

items.name: Shield of Expression

passive_effects.summary: Adds +2 to AC while equipped.

granted_actions.name: Change Shield Face
granted_actions.summary: Change the expression on the shield's face to any emotion you choose.

items.description_summary: Shield bearing a face motif. Bonus action: change the expression. +2 AC.

items.name: Smoldering Armor

passive_effects.summary: Wisps of harmless smoke rise from the armor while worn.

items.description_summary: Any armor type with smoldering aesthetic. Wisps of harmless smoke rise while worn.

items.name: Staff of Adornment

passive_effects.summary: Small ornament (flower, butterfly, bird, etc.) perches atop the staff.

items.description_summary: Topped with a small ornamental creature or object. Cosmetic only.

items.name: Staff of Birdcalls

granted_actions.name: Produce Bird Call
granted_actions.summary: Produce any bird call you know. Can be heard up to 300 ft away.

items.description_summary: 10 charges. Action: produce a bird call audible up to 300 ft. Regain 1d6+4 charges at dawn.

items.name: Staff of Flowers

granted_actions.name: Bloom Flower
granted_actions.summary: Cause a flower to bloom from the staff or a surface you touch. Flower lives 24 hours.

items.description_summary: 10 charges. Action: sprout a flower from staff tip or a surface. Regain 1d6+4 charges at dawn.

items.name: Talking Doll

passive_effects.summary: Stores up to 6 spoken phrases, repeatable on command.

items.description_summary: Store up to 6 phrases while attuned. Speak the command word and a phrase number; the doll repeats it in your voice.

items.name: Tankard of Sobriety

passive_effects.summary: Beverages drunk from this tankard cause no intoxication or drunkenness.

items.description_summary: Liquids consumed from this tankard taste however you wish but provide no intoxication.

items.name: Veteran's Cane

granted_actions.name: Transform Cane / Quarterstaff
granted_actions.summary: Cane becomes a quarterstaff or returns to cane form.

items.description_summary: Action: transform into a quarterstaff or back into a cane.

items.name: Walloping Ammunition

passive_effects.summary: On hit, DC 10 Strength save or target knocked prone.

items.description_summary: Magical ammunition. On hit, target must DC 10 Strength save or be knocked prone.

items.name: Wand of Conducting

granted_actions.name: Conduct
granted_actions.summary: Wave wand to create sounds of an orchestra playing music you conduct. Others nearby hear it.

items.description_summary: 3 charges. Action: create orchestral sounds you conduct. Regain 1d3 charges at dawn.

items.name: Wand of Pyrotechnics

granted_actions.name: Pyrotechnics
granted_actions.summary: Harmless burst of colorful sparks and noise in a 15 ft cone. No damage.

items.description_summary: 7 charges. Action: harmless fireworks in 15 ft cone. Regain 1d6+1 charges at dawn.

items.name: Wand of Scowls

granted_actions.name: Force Scowl
granted_actions.summary: Target within 30 ft must DC 10 Charisma save or scowl until your next turn.

items.description_summary: 3 charges. Action: target within 30 ft DC 10 Cha save or scowl until your next turn. Regain 1d3 charges at dawn.

items.name: Wand of Smiles

granted_actions.name: Force Smile
granted_actions.summary: Target within 30 ft must DC 10 Charisma save or smile until your next turn.

items.description_summary: 3 charges. Action: target within 30 ft DC 10 Cha save or smile until your next turn. Regain 1d3 charges at dawn.
